_comment: Committed perf regression baseline. Values are sized for both local M-series (~500us mean) and GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest (~900-1150us mean). Each baseline = ~5x ubuntu CI median, which catches genuine 5x slowdowns while tolerating CI hardware noise. Absolute budget (<50ms) in tests/test_perf.py is the primary gate; this regression assertion is the secondary smoke. Refresh procedure: docs/perf-budget.md.
